query: SELECT kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME, kcu.COLUMN_NAME, kcu.REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME, kcu.REFERENCED_COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE kcu WHERE kcu.TABLE_NAME = 'password_reset_tokens' AND kcu.REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME IS NOT NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4JQihNFt71oUk4Z.root --database DZLsNMXz8tKivpZtpPajU7 --execute SELECT kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME, kcu.COLUMN_NAME, kcu.REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME, kcu.REFERENCED_COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE kcu WHERE kcu.TABLE_NAME = 'password_reset_tokens' AND kcu.REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME IS NOT NULL;
